headline: How The Story Is Shifting For Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) As Price Targets Reset
summary: The latest update lifts Monolithic Power Systems’ fair value estimate from US$1,328.29 to US$1,417.57, adjusting the price target that many investors watch closely. That shift sits alongside a series of higher Street targets, including multiple triple digit increases. Together, these moves indicate how analysts are recalibrating their views on potential upside and execution risk. As you read on, you will see how these target moves fit into the broader narrative and how to keep track as it...

headline: MPWR Q1 Deep Dive: Strong Segment Growth, Cautious Margin Outlook Amid Robust Guidance
summary: Power management chips maker Monolithic Power Systems (NASDAQ:MPWR) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 26.1% year on year to $804.2 million. On top of that, next quarter’s revenue guidance ($900 million at the midpoint) was surprisingly good and 10.1% above what analysts were expecting. Its non-GAAP profit of $5.10 per share was 4.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
